title: Ditto Generic Authentication Webhook Config Schema
description: JSON configuration for the generic authentication webhook.

JWTSecret.description: The secret used to verify the JWT signature. If not provided, JWT signature verification is skipped.

userIDField.description: The JWT field containing the user ID. In the form 'path.to.userID'.

defaultExpirationSeconds.description: Default session expiration in seconds if JWT has no exp field.

roles.description: Map of user roles to their members. Key is the name of the role, value is an array of user IDs.

clientInfo.description: Optional arbitrary JSON data to be passed through to the client. Can be an object or an array of paths to extract from JWT (e.g., 'user.metadata')

identityServiceMetadata.description: Optional metadata to be signed and shared between peers. Can be an object or an array of paths to extract from JWT. Amount of data should be kept small for performance.

Group.description: A group of users and the permissions for that group.

members.description: Array of user IDs in this group.

read.description: Read permissions: '*' for everything, or object mapping collections to queries

write.description: Write permissions: '*' for everything, or object mapping collections to queries

remoteQuery.description: Enable remote queries (requires full read permission). Defaults to false.
